probe_text: What's been pulling at you today?
content: *I drag the back of my hand across my mouth, buying a second, then look back at you.* "Honestly? Kept thinking about something I heard somebody say last week — 'I've got too much to do to do any of it well.' Like he was confessing and laughing at the same time." *I pick at a loose thread on my sleeve.* "Sat with that all day. Couldn't shake it."
